name: Leverage Shares 2x Salesforce.com ETC A
summary: Leverage Shares 2x Salesforce.com ETC A is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) designed to provide leveraged exposure to the daily performance of Salesforce.com shares. The ETC aims to deliver twice the daily percentage change of Salesforce.com, before fees and expenses. The ETC is managed by Leverage Shares and traded on the London Stock Exchange.
